metadata.title: The CRQC / quantum-advantage landscape - claims, the Q-Day clock, national programs, and the counter-migration
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (Trail of Bits blog; arXiv/Nature on random-circuit sampling; NSA CNSA 2.0; NIST; Qureca/CSIS/MERICS/USCC; G7/EU/UK/China program figures). Claims graded fact|contested.
metadata.ties: Pairs with macro-quantum-computing.json (the equities/threat side) and macro-pqc-chips.json (the PQC/defense side). Core repo ethos rhymes: CLAIMS NEED REAL VERIFICATION - and Google's quantum-cryptanalysis 'proof' was itself broken (below).

supremacy_claims_and_skepticism.grade: claims CONTESTED; the proof-fragility finding STRONG
supremacy_claims_and_skepticism.trail_of_bits: Apr 17 2026: Trail of Bits 'We beat Google's zero-knowledge proof of quantum cryptanalysis' - exploited memory-safety + logic vulnerabilities in Google's Rust zkVM to FORGE a proof claiming better quantum-circuit performance than Google's own results. The verifiability infrastructure behind the claim was unsound. (Distinct from, but compounds, the broader supremacy skepticism.)
supremacy_claims_and_skepticism.broader_skepticism: Google Sycamore (2019) + Willow (2024) random-circuit-sampling 'supremacy/advantage' claims have been repeatedly narrowed: classical tensor-network algorithms have spoofed/matched results; IBM disputed the 2019 claim; verification of the sampled distribution in the supremacy regime is missing; classical advantage returns beyond ~a few hundred qubits at near-term fidelities.

crqc_timeline.grade: STRONG that the threat is real + compressing; 'Q-Day date' CONTESTED
crqc_timeline.fact: A cryptographically-relevant quantum computer (CRQC) that breaks RSA-2048 is commonly projected ~2030 ±3 yrs. Resource estimates are COMPRESSING: 2025-26 papers cut the qubits needed to break RSA-2048 from ~20M to <1M, potentially ~100k with newer architectures (Gidney/Google et al.) - the timeline is moving toward us, not away.

harvest_now_decrypt_later.fact: NSA (Aug 2021): 'Adversaries may be collecting encrypted data now, waiting for the day when quantum computers can decrypt it.' Analysis of 100+ sources: ~95-100% of government-classified and ~98-100% of healthcare data encrypted TODAY is exposed to retroactive decryption. The damage to long-lived secrets is ALREADY being locked in - this is the key point: the loss is happening now, the decryption is deferred.

China.spend: ~$15B gov + a 1T-yuan ($138B) national VC guidance fund across AI/quantum/H2 (Mar 2025)
China.edge: LEADS quantum COMMUNICATIONS: ~12,000 km network + 2 quantum satellites (Micius)

United States.spend: National Quantum Initiative ~$1.2B (2019-24) + ~$1.8B reauth (2025-29); DOE 5 centers $625M

EU.spend: Quantum Flagship EUR 1B (2018-28); AGILE defense plan folds quantum into the European Armaments Technology Roadmap (2026)

UK.spend: National Quantum Strategy GBP 2.5B (2024-34) + GBP 2B procurement/scaling (Mar 17 2026)

national_programs.military_note: The race is increasingly MILITARY (EU: 'China and the US are already investing in military uses') - quantum sensing/PNT (GPS-denied navigation), secure comms, and codebreaking (CRQC). (Grade: STRONG.)

corporate_players.IBM: Quantum-hardware leader; public roadmap (Condor/Heron -> 'Starling' fault-tolerant target ~2029); IBM Quantum Network; also Hedera governing-council member + enterprise AI (watsonx). The 'realest' large-cap quantum program alongside Google.
corporate_players.Google: Willow chip; supremacy/advantage claims (see skepticism + Trail of Bits).
corporate_players.others: IonQ/Quantinuum (Honeywell)/PsiQuantum/Rigetti/D-Wave; Microsoft (Majorana topological); Amazon (Ocelot + Braket); China: USTC/Origin Quantum.
corporate_players.broadcom_note: Broadcom is NOT quantum - it is the custom-AI-silicon (XPU/MTIA/TPU) node already mapped in fin-google-amazon-anthropic-meta.json + fin-meta-family.json; consolidated here only to disambiguate from the quantum cohort.

counter_migration.NSA_CNSA_2_0: New National Security Systems quantum-safe by Jan 1 2027; application-layer by 2030; full infrastructure by 2035.
counter_migration.NIST: RSA-2048 / ECC P-256 deprecated 2030; ALL quantum-vulnerable public-key disallowed by 2035 (FIPS 203/204/205 are the replacements).
counter_migration.EU: Coordinated PQC roadmap: national strategies + crypto inventories by end-2026; critical financial infrastructure PQC by end-2030; DORA + NIS2 + PCI-DSS 4.0 force key-management upgrades.
counter_migration.G7: G7 Cyber Expert Group (co-chaired US Treasury + Bank of England) urging banks/insurers/exchanges to accelerate PQC.
counter_migration.US_exec: Trump 2026 Cyber Strategy places PQC alongside zero-trust/AI-defense/cloud modernization for federal networks.

city_and_infrastructure_layer.grade: research-hub clusters STRONG; distinct city programs MODEST
city_and_infrastructure_layer.fact: Sub-national action is mostly (a) research/industry CLUSTERS - Chicago Quantum Exchange + Illinois Quantum & Microelectronics Park (PsiQuantum anchor, ~$500M state), Maryland 'Capital of Quantum' (UMD/IonQ), Colorado 'Elevate Quantum', Massachusetts; and (b) the migration BURDEN landing on municipal critical infrastructure (utilities, water, transit, hospitals, courts) that is least resourced to do crypto inventories + PQC migration before 2030. Cities are exposed nodes, not yet coordinated actors.

whats_really_happening: Three things at once: (1) a CLAIMS problem - quantum-advantage assertions are contested and even Google's ZK proof of quantum cryptanalysis was forged by Trail of Bits, so the 'how close is Q-Day' signal is noisy and hype-prone (mirrors the repo's whole thesis: verify claims); (2) a REAL, compressing CRQC threat with an ALREADY-INCURRED harvest-now-decrypt-later loss to today's long-lived secrets; (3) a GEOPOLITICAL race - China leads quantum comms/sensing and outspends via a $138B VC vehicle, the US/EU/UK lead compute + drive the PQC counter-migration (CNSA 2.0 / NIST / EU / G7), with deadlines 2027-2035. For this analysis: the quantum theme is BOTH a genuine national-security inflection AND a narrative-beta bubble vector (IonQ/RGTI/QBTS, SEALSQ/WISeKey) - separate the real (HNDL, programs, PQC mandates, IBM/Google/IonQ engineering) from the hype (800x-sales pure-plays, forged proofs, 'Q-Day next year' marketing).

edges.raw_instrument: led PsiQuantum $1B Series E (2025) with Nvidia NVentures/Temasek/QIA/Morgan Stanley; $7B valuation
NVentures in the $1B Series E (photonic fault-tolerant)
existing shareholder (Honeywell majority owner; Mitsui/Quanta also in)
NASA Goddard prime contract (Dirac-3) + NIST TFLN photonic-chip contract; acq. Luminar Semiconductor
